all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
But against any of the children of Israel shall not a dog move his tongue, against man or beast: that ye may know how that the Lord doth put a difference between the Egyptians and Israel.
Exodus 11:7
Quote of the Day
"You live in challenging times when the adversary seeks to make you his. Do not be drawn off."
Elder Ronald A. Rasband | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
